batch_objective: Hex viewer UX correctness batch: (a) hex-text search resumes from the current page after pagination, (b) the MAC tab's hex pane is wide and tall enough to render a full hex row, (c) goto handler reports out-of-range addresses and marks valid focus rows with a plain-text glyph that does not collide with the sev-* validation severity classes or the existing byte-level search/MAC highlights. TUI-only — no parser/engine changes.
